help.daemon_skills.enabled: Enable or disable daemon skills globally
help.daemon_skills.max_concurrent_daemon: Maximum number of daemons that can run simultaneously
help.daemon_skills.global_rate_limit_sec: Minimum seconds between daemon wake-up calls to the agent
help.daemon_skills.max_wakeups_per_hour: Maximum total agent wake-ups from all daemons per hour
help.daemon_skills.max_budget_per_hour: Maximum LLM cost (in USD) that daemon wake-ups can consume per hour
